name: Source Vulnerable to this Exploit
notes: This rule triggers when a local host is attacked where the source host is vulnerable to the attack being used. This could indicate the host was targeted in a previous exploit or vulnerability.
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
when the source is vulnerable to current exploit on any port
TD_list: APPLY Source Vulnerable to this Exploit on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Exploit, Potential Exploit
AND when the event context is Local to Local, Remote to Local
AND when the source is vulnerable to current exploit on any port
RED_list: Event name: Source vulnerable to same attack.

Event description: Detects when a local host is attacked where the source host is vulnerable to the attack being used. This could indicate the host was targeted in a previous exploit or vulnerability.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
Include detected events by "Source IP" from this point forward, in the offense, for 300 second(s)
This information should not contribute to the naming of the associated offense(s)
